description: A vulnerability was determined in Tenda CH22 1.0.0.1. This issue affects the function fromDhcpListClient of the file /goform/DhcpListClient. This manipulation of the argument page causes buffer overflow. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.
